report_title: Nova Creature - Memory Application Training Evaluation

search_improvements.issue: where am i from - all stop words
search_improvements.fix: Extended fallback to handle 6+ clean words

search_improvements.issue: what is my cat name - false positive
search_improvements.fix: Orphan word detection rejects queries with words absent from all lessons

search_improvements.issue: what is my dog name vs my name - wrong match
search_improvements.fix: Content-match scoring (100x) prioritizes specific over generic matches
Use original text (not lowercased) for value extraction

anti_echo_rules: No 'saved knowledge' labels in final answer
No debug labels in final answer
No raw JSON/memory dump in final answer
No repeating the user's question verbatim
No first-person (I) responses - always second person (You/Your)
files_changed: src/nova_hybrid_router.py - _search_lessons rewrite + synthesis rules + fact detection patterns
known_issues: Facts saved through LLM path don't show 'memory_saved' in route trace (minor display issue)
Some multi-word facts (e.g., 'I am from Earth') route through LLM instead of memory path
Case-sensitive matching for 'My X name is Y' requires exact [Mm]y capitalization
next_recommendations: Train transformers on memory_application_training_data.jsonl for generalization
Add synthesis-aware response formatting in the LLM path
Extend patterns to cover more relationship types (spouse, child, friend names)
Add batch fact import from conversation history
